comments.body:
Request #381935 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #381935:

Hello Manish,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on silviya-co.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

We will update you soon.

Thanks and Regards,

comments.body:
Call Summary:

Customer was shared by Amazon team that the app will cost only $9.
Customer is not ready to pay more than $9 to use the app.
In off-season, he will be shipping 100-300 orders per month.
In peak season, he will be shipping 1000-1500 orders per month.
He would also require the tracking status to be updated in Shopify orders from the app.
Need to check with Abhilash about the requirements and feasibility.

The app was installed and Amazon Shipping connected. No new orders were available, so did not go with label generation process.
Once pricing is addressed, we will connect again to go over

comments.body:
Hello Manish,

We have forwarded your pricing concern to the senior management for further review.

We will update you in the coming week.

You have free trial with the app available till April 15 and if needed, we can extend it further till April 30, until your concerns are addressed.

We will get back to you as soon as possible.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

You have free trial with the app available till April 15 and if needed, we can extend it further till April 30, until your concerns are addressed.
 
We will get back to you as soon as possible.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef

comments.body:
Call Summary:

Customer had 2 new orders which were imported in the app but were in Initial Status due to Ship From Address not being configured.
Configured the Ship From Address in the app and shared about label generation process with the app.
Customer also wanted to add his BlueDart Account. Currently, he has switched to Starter plan to test the app with BlueDart as well, but his requirement to use the app on $9 plan for his requirements still stands.
Need to discuss this with Vimal/Sanoop once they are available next week.

comments.body:
Hello Manish,

Thank you for your confirmation about the plan requirement with Abhilash over a call.

We will be enabling the plan for the app on your store as discussed - **$150 (Yearly Plan)** soon. This plan will cover the following for your store -

1. 4000 orders/labels for the plan duration.
2. Integration for 2 carriers in the app.
3. Tracking status updates in Shopify orders from the app.

We are getting a final confirmation on the plan internally. Once confirmed, the plan will be activated in the app on your store.

For the tracking updates in Shopify orders, please allow us some time. We will update you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Manish,
 
Thank you for your confirmation about the plan requirement with Abhilash over a call.
 
We will be enabling the plan for the app on your store as discussed - $150 (Yearly Plan) soon. This plan will cover the following for your store -
  1. 4000 orders/labels for the plan duration.
  2. Integration for 2 carriers in the app.
  3. Tracking status updates in Shopify orders from the app.
 
We are getting a final confirmation on the plan internally. Once confirmed, the plan will be activated in the app on your store.
 
For the tracking updates in Shopify orders, please allow us some time. We will update you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775555980307369

India Customer referred by Amazon team.
Customer is looking to use the app with Amazon and BlueDart for his requirements. His requirements -

- 2 carrier integrations
- Volume - In off-season, 100–300 orders per month. In peak season (Diwali), 1000–1500 orders per month.
- Tracking status updates in Shopify orders from the app.
However, customer was not ready to go for any plan higher than $9.

Discussed with Abhilash and Keerthi, and Abhilash pitched the following plan for the customer - **$150 (Yearly Plan) with 4000 shipment + 2 carrier integrations + tracking updates.** Customer is okay with this plan.

Needs assistance from team in 2 things -

1. Create a customer plan. **Pending confirmation from Vimal.**
2. Enable tracking updates.

URL - silviya-co.myshopify.com
Account ID - f5667bf2-b1f9-41ec-877b-e59cff7576ed

comments.body:
Hello Manish,

Thank you for your patience.

We have enabled the tracking updates from the app on your store.

Once a new tracking update is available from the carrier, it will be reflected in the app and the tracking status will be updated in the Shopify Orders page as well.

You can check and let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

You can check and let us know if you have any further queries.

comments.body:
Dear sir,


Kindly add on, if I want to upgrade my plan from 150 $ to 200 $ during one year plan, number of shipments are 4000 to 8000.
comments.html_body:
Dear sir,

Kindly add on, if I want to upgrade my plan from 150 $ to 200 $ during one year plan, number of shipments are 4000 to 8000.
comments.plain_body:
Dear sir, 
  Kindly add on, if I want to upgrade my plan from 150 $ to 200 $ during one year plan, number of shipments are 4000 to 8000.

comments.body:
Hello Manish,

I had a discussion with my team regarding this requirement from you.

As we are creating a customized plan ($150 for 4000 shipments) for you based on your requirements, switching or altering the plan midway will not be possible. As such, you can do one of the following -

- Either opt for the $200 plan for 8000 shipments from the start, OR,
- Use the $150 for 4000 shipments and once this plan is exhausted, we can discuss a new customized plan based on your requirements at that time.

Let us know how you would like to proceed.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Manish,
 
I had a discussion with my team regarding this requirement from you.
 
As we are creating a customized plan ($150 for 4000 shipments) for you based on your requirements, switching or altering the plan midway will not be possible. As such, you can do one of the following - 
  • Either opt for the $200 plan for 8000 shipments from the start, OR,
  • Use the $150 for 4000 shipments and once this plan is exhausted, we can discuss a new customized plan based on your requirements at that time.
 
Let us know how you would like to proceed.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
